title: Tools, Device Commands, PBQs, and Certification Capstone · Fault Triage
summary: Use software, hardware, discovery, capture, and device evidence to design, implement, secure, operate, and repair a branch network. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a performance-based branch network capstone and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Use ping, traceroute or tracert, nslookup, dig, netstat, ip, ifconfig, ipconfig, arp, and tcpdump with platform-aware interpretation.
Use protocol analyzers and authorized Nmap discovery or service probes with scope, timing, vantage, and false-result awareness.
Use LLDP or CDP and speed tests while accounting for device support, advertisement trust, test path, server, and competing load.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Net Certification Evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Net Certification Evidence assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed debug case for network tools capstone that tests this competency: Defend a complete design, implementation, operations, security, recovery, and troubleshooting result against N10-009 objectives.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Net Certification Evidence has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Net Certification Evidence precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case for network tools capstone that tests this competency: Defend a complete design, implementation, operations, security, recovery, and troubleshooting result against N10-009 objectives.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Memorizing acronyms and port numbers demonstrates complete Network Plus readiness.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the debug Net Certification Evidence case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the debug Net Certification Evidence case
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence for the debug Net Certification Evidence case
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Net Certification Evidence case

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a safe network investigation headed "# Evidence: net-certification-evidence-17kgex" with a concrete hypothesis, one bounded simulator command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Certification Evidence into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: net-certification-evidence-17kgex
# hypothesis: [replace with one falsifiable cause]
# command: choose one bounded simulator observation
# observation: [replace with the result that changes the next decision]

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Net Certification Evidence structural check is only one gate. a complete first version of a performance-based branch network capstone while every earlier competency remains active must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend a complete design, implementation, operations, security, recovery, and troubleshooting result against N10-009 objectives.
